summary: Well-structured literature-built network (43 nodes, 53 edges, 44.2% source). Perception Gate purity is preserved for all three hormones — GA, BL, and Auxin each route only through their receptor — which correctly blocks Trap-3 signaling-mutant rescues (Rht-B1b + GA3, TaBRI1 triple + BL). Per-node coverage is healthy: no major hub is silently under-represented (no node with ≥5 curated edges has <0.30 coverage). The 26 rejected curated edges are defensible (4 bypasses, 4 damping feedbacks, 4 peripheral PROCESS targets, 4 early-GA enzymes consolidated, plus direct-phenotype edges correctly routed via mechanism intermediates). Minor advisory gaps remain: TaEXP (expansin) was dropped entirely rather than wired via a non-bypass upstream; this is an acceptable architectural trade-off but flags a LOW-priority literature_gap for a TaARF→TaEXP or TaPIF4→TaEXP primary wheat paper. Network is approved to proceed to Step 3.

pathway_completeness.justification: All major wheat-height pathways are represented end-to-end: GA biosynthesis (TAGA20OX, TAGA3OX) + catabolism (TAGA2OX, TAGA1OX1); GA perception via TAGID1-SCF-TASLY1; DELLA homeolog-specific RHT_B1 and RHT_D1 with direct growth-repression to Plant_Height and indirect repression via PIF/PLATZ_A1/TAGRF4; BR biosynthesis (TAD11, TADWF4) + perception (TABRI1, TASERK, TABKI1, TAZNF) + transduction (TABIN2, TABZR1); Auxin perception (TATIR1, TAIAA, TAARF) + TaARF4-TaHB33-TaGH3 homeostasis; Light/PIF axis with TAERF_A1; Vernalization/VRN1; Photoperiod/PPD_D1; specialty Rht loci (Rht8, Rht12, Rht13, Rht18, Rht24, TAOSCA1_4, PLATZ_A1). Minor gap: no cell-wall-effector node (TaEXP dropped to preserve Perception Gate purity — cannot be added without curated non-bypass upstream). BR biosynthesis has synthesis but no degradation (Motif 4 half-applied).

pathway_coverage_table.GA_biosynthesis_early: documented as literature_gap (TaCPS/TaKS/TaKO/TaKAO excluded; no perturbation coverage)
pathway_coverage_table.DELLA_degradation: complete (TAGID1 + TASLY1 → RHT_B1, RHT_D1 — Perception Gate Motif 1)
pathway_coverage_table.Green_Revolution_alleles: encoded at node level (RHT_B1, RHT_D1 separate); GOF handled at Step 3 via gm
pathway_coverage_table.Rht12_18_24_mechanism: wired via RHT → TAGA2OX (closes G002 gap)
pathway_coverage_table.BR_perception_signalling: complete (BL → TaBRI1 + TaSERK → TaBKI1 release → TaBIN2 → TaBZR1)
pathway_coverage_table.Auxin_to_GA_crosstalk: MISSING — literature_gap G007 carried over from Step 1.5
pathway_coverage_table.Cell_wall_elongation_effectors: MISSING — TaEXP dropped; literature_gap for non-bypass upstream

mechanistic_depth.justification: The GA axis has proper 4-5 step cascades: TAGA20OX/TAGA3OX → Gibberellin → TAGID1 → RHT_B1 → (PIF/PLATZ_A1/TAGRF4) → Plant_Height. BR cascade is 5 steps: BL → TABRI1 → TABIN2 → TABZR1 → Plant_Height (with TABKI1 mutual-inhibition gate, TAZNF release, TASERK co-receptor). Auxin is 4 steps to Plant_Height. Some nodes feed Plant_Height directly without intermediates (TAOSCA1_4, PPD_D1, PLATZ_A1, Pathogenesis_Related_Genes) — defensible because no curated mechanistic intermediate exists for these specialty routes. Max path length is ~5 hops (within §10 limit of 7).

motif_coverage.justification: Perception Gate (Motif 1) applied correctly and purely for all three hormones: Gibberellin → TAGID1 with TASLY1 co-inhibitor on RHT_B1/RHT_D1; Brassinosteroid → TABRI1 with TASERK co-receptor (and TABKI1/TAZNF mutual-inhibition sub-motif); Auxin → TATIR1 with TAIAA degradation. Biosynthesis-Degradation Balance (Motif 4) applied to GA (synthesis TAGA20OX+TAGA3OX vs. catabolism TAGA2OX+TAGA1OX1) — exemplary. Multi-Output Scaffold (Motif 5) on TAGID1 and TASLY1 targeting both DELLA homeologs; on RHT_B1 with multiple downstream targets. Self-Limiting Feedback (Motif 6 hormone variant) via Gibberellin → TAGA2OX → Gibberellin loop. Coherent Feed-Forward (Motif 3) via RHT_B1 → Plant_Height direct AND via PIF/PLATZ_A1. Mutual Inhibition (Motif 7) partially: TABZR1 ⊣ RHT_B1 paired with TABIN2 → RHT_B1 stabilisation creates BR–GA antagonism but not a strict bistable switch. Not scored 5 because: (a) BR side of Biosynthesis-Degradation Balance is one-sided (no curated BR-degradation gene), (b) the Auxin-GA crosstalk feed-forward (Motif 3) is absent due to G007 literature gap.

cascade_balance.justification: 43 nodes, 19 sources (44.2%) — squarely in 30–50% target. Max activators on any node = 5 (Gibberellin and Plant_Height); max inhibitors = 5 (RHT_B1) — both within the 7-cap with comfort. No dead-end nodes; no >7-input hubs; one connected component (verified by backward BFS). Geometric-mean dilution risk is bounded.

composite_node_handling.justification: Homeolog-handling convention matches the Step 1.5 decision exactly: DELLA split (RHT_B1, RHT_D1 separate — each has distinct Green Revolution allele phenotype on different chromosomes); GA-pathway enzymes and BR-receptor family composite (TAGA20OX, TAGA3OX, TAGA2OX, TAGID1, TABRI1, TABZR1, TABIN2, VRN1, TAGRF4, TAARF, TAIAA, TATIR1); allele-specific nodes where a named allele IS the phenotype driver (PLATZ-A1 = Rht25, TAARF4, TAERF-A1 = JD6, PPD_D1 = Ppd-D1a, TAOSCA1_4, RHT18, RHT24, RHT12, TAGA1OX1 = TaGA1ox1-B1). The composite node rules §9.3 are followed: functional redundancy + same target + same sign all hold. RHT_A1 omission is documented in Step 1.5 as acceptable (minor homeolog without homeolog-specific phenotype evidence).

hub_completeness.justification: Major hub coverage: RHT_B1 (11/16 curated = 69%); Plant_Height (9/17 = 53%); Gibberellin (8/18 = 44%); TABRI1 (5/6 = 83%); TAGA2OX (5/5 = 100%); TABZR1 (3/3 = 100%). RHT_B1 exclusions are all defensible (E012 perception-gate bypass; E051/E055/E056/E058 peripheral PROCESS; TAGA2OX feedback redundant with RHT_B1 → TAGA20OX → Gibberellin ⊣ RHT_B1 cycle). Gibberellin coverage at 44% is the lowest among majors but every excluded edge is either a bypass (E012, E013, E041), a damping feedback (E014, E015, E017) or an early-GA enzyme consolidated away (E064–E067). No silent hub-regulator drops.

topology_hazards.justification: No positive Hormone↔Transporter loops. No sole-activator collapses (Plant_Height has 5 activators). No undocumented self-loops. Perception Gate purity: Brassinosteroid has exactly one outgoing edge (→ TABRI1) ✓; Auxin has exactly one (→ TATIR1) ✓; Gibberellin has two (→ TAGID1 and → TAGA2OX). The second edge (GA → TAGA2OX) implements Motif 6 self-limiting homeostasis — it does NOT bypass the receptor to reach any downstream TF or Plant_Height activator (TAGA2OX feeds only back into Gibberellin as an inhibitor). Under Rht-B1b + GA3, this loop only dampens GA elevation; it cannot produce a rescue bypass. Marked down one point as a topology advisory — the outgoing edge should be explicitly documented as homeostatic (not a perception-gate violation) in the edge mechanism string; otherwise a future reviewer could confuse it for a bypass.

evidence_quality.justification: Spot-check (10 edges): mechanism strings are consistently specific (N014 'GA-bound TaGID1 binds Rht-B1 DELLA N-terminal motif, recruiting SCF-SLY1 for ubiquitination'; N040 'TaBIN2 phosphorylates and stabilises DELLA (when BR low); BR-GA crosstalk'; N038 'Dephosphorylated TaBZR1/TaBES1 activates BR-response growth and cell-elongation genes'). Evidence sentences are direct paper quotes. Mix of full_text_read and abstract_read, documented per edge. No vague 'X regulates Y' strings detected.

phenotype_audit.justification: Plant_Height has 5 activators (PLATZ_A1, PIF, TABZR1, TAARF, TAOSCA1_4) and 4 inhibitors (RHT_B1, RHT_D1, PPD_D1, Pathogenesis_Related_Genes) — at the top of the 3-5 target for activators and 4 for inhibitors. Major effector classes present: DELLA TFs (RHT_B1, RHT_D1), BR-response TF (TABZR1), auxin-response TF (TAARF), light-response TF (PIF), photoperiod regulator (PPD_D1), developmental enforcer (PLATZ_A1), novel Ca2+-signalling (TAOSCA1_4), cell-wall cross-linking (PR_Genes). Missing effector class: cell-wall-loosening expansins (TaEXP dropped). Both promoting and repressing arms are present and balanced (5 up, 4 down). Marked down one point for the expansin gap.

rejected_edges_review.justification: 26 curated edges rejected; each has a defensible reason documented either in network.json metadata or implicit in the Perception Gate / composite / PROCESS-peripheral logic: (a) Perception-Gate bypasses E012, E013, E041, E042 — correct removal; (b) damping feedbacks E014, E015, E017, E035 — simplification trade-off to avoid signal-kill; (c) peripheral PROCESS targets E051, E055, E056, E058 (Rht-B1 to photosynthesis/dormancy/coleoptile/anther length — off-target phenotypes) — correct; (d) early GA enzymes E064–E067 — composite-consolidation literature_gap (no perturbations map to TaCPS/TaKS/TaKO/TaKAO individually); (e) direct-phenotype edges routed via mechanistic intermediate: E023 (TAGRF4 via RHT_B1), E031 (TABRI1 via TABIN2→TABZR1), E045 (VRN1 via TAGA20OX), E047 (RHT8 via Gibberellin), E057 (TAZNF via TABKI1→TABRI1 cascade), E074 (TAERF_A1 via PIF); (f) E043 TaEXP→Plant_Height + E040 Auxin→TaEXP consequence of TaEXP node drop; (g) dead-end sink E021 PLATZ→TAGRF1 — correctly dropped. One point off because (f) deserves more explicit metadata justification than the BUILDER provided.

key_player_density.justification: Per-node coverage ratio audit (all nodes with ≥2 curated edges checked): NO node meets the §9.11 flag criterion (≥5 curated AND <0.30 coverage). The lowest ratio among majors is Gibberellin at 0.44 — above the 0.30 threshold. Every Green-Revolution-relevant hub (RHT_B1 0.69, TABRI1 0.83, TAGA2OX 1.00, TABZR1 1.00, Plant_Height 0.53) is well represented. Anti-Pattern 6 (silent under-representation) does not apply.
key_player_density.homeolog_convention_check: CONSISTENT — matches Step 1.5 decision: DELLA split (RHT_B1, RHT_D1 separate); GA/BR receptors and enzymes composite; allele-specific where allele-driven.

per_node_audit.comment: Source environmental input. Only curated downstream edge to VRN1 is included.
Source. Connects long-day signal to Ppd-D1 per Chen 2018.
Source. Phytochrome-degradation of PIF is the only curated link — correctly captured.
Source. Camut 2021 dual route (N→GA biosynthesis and N→DELLA destabilisation) both present.

Biosynthesis-Degradation Balance correctly applied. Two outgoing edges — receptor (TAGID1) and homeostatic self-catabolism (TAGA2OX) — the second is Motif 6 self-limiting, not a perception-gate bypass. Coverage ratio 0.44.
Exactly one outgoing edge to the receptor — perception-gate pure. Missing BR-degradation gene (no curated).
Near-source; one outgoing edge to TATIR1 — perception-gate pure. TaGH3 conjugation is only curated regulator of Auxin itself.
Source F-box co-repressor of DELLA; paired with TAGID1 as Perception Gate co-inhibitors. No upstream regulator curated in wheat.
Source biosynthesis enzyme. Feedback edge excluded to avoid dampening GA signal propagation.
Source; diverts GA precursors to inactive forms.
Constitutive BR co-receptor source; Singh 2016 heterodimer evidence.

curated_regulators_excluded: TAZNF→Plant_Height direct (E057) — routed via BR cascade
per_node_audit.comment: Source RING E3 ligase; correctly routed via TABKI1→TABRI1 cascade rather than direct to Plant_Height.
Source; allele-specific ARF4 homeolog per Step 1.5 convention.

curated_regulators_excluded: TAERF_A1→Plant_Height direct (E074) — routed via PIF mechanism
per_node_audit.comment: Source AP2/ERF TF; mechanistic path via PIF correctly preserved (Li 2024 EMSA/ChIP).
Source (no published upstream regulator — G005 unclosable). Mechanistic path via Gibberellin preserves causal chain.
Source autoactive NB-LRR; GA-independent cell-wall-peroxidase mechanism preserved.
Source allele; TaGA2ox-A9 OE mechanism wired (Ford 2018).
Source allele; TaGA2ox-A9 OE mechanism wired (Tian 2022).
Source allele; TaGA2oxA13 OE mechanism wired (Zhang 2023).
Source novel Rht gene; direct Plant_Height edge is the only curated mechanism (GA-independent Ca2+ channel, Lv 2024).
Source BR C6-oxidase; feedback exclusion defensible.
Source rate-limiting BR biosynthesis (Milner 2022); closes G003.
Perception Gate receptor; Multi-Output Scaffold targeting both DELLA homeologs.
DELLA-mediated positive feedback correctly captured; VRN1 vernalization-GA link included.
Four specialty-Rht activators + GA homeostatic self-activation. Serves dual role as catabolism enzyme and convergence point for all Rht-GA-catabolism alleles.
Central DELLA hub. Coverage 69%. Multi-Output Scaffold with 5 downstream targets. BR-GA crosstalk wired both ways (TABZR1 ⊣, TABIN2 →). Perception-gate purity preserved.
Second DELLA homeolog; asymmetric coverage vs RHT_B1 reflects literature — Rht-D1-specific mechanistic papers are fewer. Acceptable.
Rht25 causal gene; dead-end TaGRF1 correctly dropped per judge report option (b).

curated_regulators_excluded: TAGRF4→Plant_Height direct (E023) — routed via DELLA antagonism
per_node_audit.comment: Mutual-antagonism with DELLA correctly encoded; direct Plant_Height edge redundant with DELLA path.
All curated PIF regulators and outputs present (100% coverage). Perfect integration hub.
Photoperiod-driven internode-shortening preserved end-to-end.
Vernalization-to-GA biosynthesis route (Liu 2025); direct Plant_Height redundant — correctly excluded.
BR Perception Gate receptor; Mutual Inhibition with TABKI1 encodes Motif 7 bistable switch. 83% coverage.
BRI1-kinase-inhibitor correctly wired as mutual inhibitor of TABRI1 with TAZNF as BR-activated release.
GSK3-like kinase; negative regulator of both TABZR1 and positive regulator of DELLA (BR-off state) — correct dual output.
BR response TF; Multi-Output Scaffold to growth and DELLA antagonism. 100% coverage.
Auxin receptor; linear Perception Gate chain correctly implemented.
Aux/IAA repressor; standard auxin cascade step.
Auxin response TF; direct Plant_Height edge preserves auxin branch connectivity (no curated TAARF→TAEXP in wheat).
HD-Zip intermediate in auxin homeostasis loop.
Gretchen Hagen 3 IAA-conjugase; closes the TAARF4-modulation sub-loop for Auxin.
Class-III peroxidases; cell-wall cross-linking mechanism for Rht13 dwarfism (Borrill 2022).
5 activators + 4 inhibitors — both arms represented; all major hormone/TF/cell-wall classes (except TaEXP). Redundant direct edges correctly routed through mechanism intermediates.

per_pathway_audit.comment: TAGA20OX (rate-limiting) + TAGA3OX (3β-hydroxylation) both present as activators of Gibberellin. VRN1-driven biosynthesis and DELLA positive-feedback biosynthesis both wired.
missing_pieces: TaCPS/TaKS/TaKO/TaKAO early pathway (E064–E067) documented as literature_gap — no perturbation coverage justifies exclusion

per_pathway_audit.comment: TAGA2OX (major) + TAGA1OX1 (diversion) both inhibit Gibberellin. TAGA2OX additionally receives RHT18/RHT24/RHT12 allele-driven upregulation — all three specialty Rht loci converge here (closes G002).

Textbook Perception Gate (Motif 1). Gibberellin → TAGID1 (+1) is the only ligand-receptor edge; TAGID1 AND TASLY1 act as co-inhibitors (Multi-Output Scaffold Motif 5) on RHT_B1 AND RHT_D1. No direct GA → DELLA bypass — Rht-B1b + GA3 Trap-3 test architecturally blocked.

Direct -1 edges from both RHT_B1 and RHT_D1 to Plant_Height (canonical DELLA mechanism). Coherent Feed-Forward (Motif 3) via RHT_B1 → {PLATZ_A1, TAGRF4, PIF} → Plant_Height sub-paths. All signs correctly negative.
Self-limiting feedback RHT_B1 → TAGA20OX (+1) correctly implements DELLA-induced GA biosynthesis. Homeostatic loop: GA↑ → DELLA↓ → TAGA20OX↓ → GA↓; stabilising negative feedback.

RHT_B1 and RHT_D1 are separate homeolog-specific nodes. GOF allele encoding deferred to Step 3 (gm=2.0 on the DELLA node). Because GA has no direct DELLA bypass, Rht-B1b + GA3 cannot be rescued through the model — correct Trap-3 blocking.

Rht8 → Gibberellin (+1) captures GA-biosynthesis-route mechanism (Xiong 2022 abstract). Upstream regulator genuinely unknown (G005 unclosable). Direct Rht8→Plant_Height (E047) correctly routed via GA.

per_pathway_audit.pathway: Rht12 / Rht18 / Rht24 as TaGA2ox OE variants
per_pathway_audit.comment: Three allele-specific GENE nodes each with +1 edge to TAGA2OX — closes the G002 hub-underrepresented gap. Mechanistic convergence correct.
RHT13 → Pathogenesis_Related_Genes (+1) → Plant_Height (-1) — two-step cascade through class-III peroxidase cell-wall cross-linking. GA-independent mechanism preserved.

Synthesis arm complete (TaD11 late + TaDWF4 rate-limiting; closes G003). No BR-degradation gene curated in wheat — half-applied Biosynthesis-Degradation Balance (Motif 4). This is a literature gap, not a BUILDER oversight.

per_pathway_audit.pathway: BR perception + signalling (BL → TaBRI1 + TaSERK → TaBIN2 → TaBZR1)
per_pathway_audit.comment: Full canonical cascade: BL → TABRI1 (+1); TASERK co-activates TABRI1; TABKI1 mutual-inhibition release (Motif 7) via TAZNF; TABRI1 ⊣ TABIN2 ⊣ TABZR1 → Plant_Height. All five signalling-cascade components present (closes G004).

Both documented crosstalk arms present: TABZR1 ⊣ RHT_B1 (BZR1 sequesters DELLA) and TABIN2 → RHT_B1 (+1, BIN2 phosphorylates/stabilises DELLA when BR low). Creates coherent BR↑ → dwarfism-rescue signal.
Canonical Aux/IAA Perception Gate: Auxin has exactly one outgoing edge (→ TATIR1). Chain preserves perception-gate purity.
TaARF4-specific regulatory loop wired with correct signs per Wang 2019.

G007 residual gap from Step 1.5 — no OA wheat primary paper. BUILDER metadata correctly flags as literature_gap. Without this edge, auxin modulation of stem GA biosynthesis (canonical in Arabidopsis/bamboo) is not modelled.
missing_pieces: Wheat primary paper for Auxin→TaGA20ox transcriptional activation

per_pathway_audit.comment: TaEXP was dropped entirely by BUILDER because the only curated upstream edges (Auxin/GA/BR → TaEXP, E040/E041/E042) are Perception-Gate bypasses. Correct architectural decision but leaves no expansin effector in the model. Plant_Height's cell-wall-output is absorbed into PIF, TABZR1, and TAARF (all of which biologically activate expansins in planta). Literature_gap for a curated non-bypass upstream (e.g., TaPIF4 → TaEXP, TaBZR1 → TaEXP, TaARF → TaEXP in wheat).
missing_pieces: Non-bypass upstream for TaEXP in curated_edges.json

per_pathway_audit.comment: Light ⊣ PIF (phytochrome degradation); TAERF_A1 → PIF transcriptional activation (Li 2024; closes G008); RHT_B1 ⊣ PIF (DELLA sequestration); PIF → Plant_Height (+1). Four-input integration hub captured completely.
Photoperiod → PPD_D1 → Plant_Height end-to-end captured (Chen 2018).
Vernalization → VRN1 → TAGA20OX → Gibberellin route preserved; direct VRN1→Plant_Height redundant and correctly excluded.
Novel Rht gene; only curated mechanism is direct Plant_Height activation (GA-independent). Included as direct edge with appropriate LOW_confidence marker in mechanism description.

suggestions.description: Flag Step 1 follow-up: curated edges for TaEXP only come via Perception-Gate-violating direct hormone edges (E040/E041/E042). A wheat primary paper wiring TaEXP via TaPIF4, TaBZR1, or TaARF would allow re-adding the canonical cell-wall-loosening effector node without creating a Trap-3 bypass.
suggestions.biological_justification: Expansins (TaEXPA/B, TaXTH) are the biochemical effectors of cell-wall creep that physically enable internode elongation. The model currently has no cell-wall-effector node; Plant_Height activation relies entirely on TF-level outputs (PIF, TABZR1, TAARF, PLATZ_A1). This is biologically incomplete though simulation-wise the TFs absorb the effector role. Adding TaEXP properly requires a curated non-bypass upstream.
suggestions.implementation: Step 1 LITERATURE REVIEW search: 'wheat TaPIF4 expansin transcriptional target', 'TaBZR1 ChIP-seq expansin', 'wheat ARF expansin cell wall'. If a primary paper establishes one of these edges, BUILDER adds TaEXP node + the new edge + TaEXP→Plant_Height (+1, E043).

suggestions.description: Carry forward G007 from Step 1.5: Auxin → TAGA20OX crosstalk has no OA wheat primary paper despite being canonical in Arabidopsis/bamboo/tobacco. Re-flagging for any subsequent literature sweep.
suggestions.biological_justification: Auxin induces stem GA biosynthesis; this edge would connect the auxin and GA arms of the network directly (currently crosstalk is limited to the BR-GA axis). Without it, decapitation/auxin-depletion experiments cannot reduce stem GA pool.
suggestions.implementation: Step 1 LITERATURE REVIEW search: 'wheat ARF GA20ox promoter AuxRE', 'Triticum auxin-induced gibberellin biosynthesis stem'.

suggestions.description: Edge N007 (Gibberellin → TAGA2OX +1) is the second outgoing edge from Gibberellin; document its role as Motif-6 self-limiting homeostasis rather than a Perception-Gate second path in the mechanism string.
suggestions.biological_justification: Strict reading of BUILDER §12 Motif 1 'ligand has only one outgoing edge' could mislead a future reviewer into treating N007 as a bypass. In practice N007 is a safe self-limiting homeostasis (Motif 6 hormone variant) — GA-induced catabolism via TAGA2OX damps GA but cannot route signal to Plant_Height. Mechanism string update preserves the architectural intent for the paper-trail.
suggestions.implementation: BUILDER updates edge N007 mechanism to append '(Motif 6 self-limiting homeostasis — GA induces TaGA2ox which then catabolises GA; does not bypass the TaGID1 perception gate because TaGA2ox has no downstream effector path to Plant_Height)'. Non-structural change.

literature_gaps: TaPIF4 / TaBZR1 / TaARF transcriptional target for TaEXP (or similar wheat cell-wall-effector wiring that does not bypass Perception Gates) — would allow re-adding TaEXP node.
Wheat primary paper for Auxin → TaGA20ox (G007 carried over from Step 1.5).
Wheat BR-degradation gene (TaBAS1 / TaCYP734A1 ortholog) — would complete Biosynthesis-Degradation Balance (Motif 4) on the BR side.
TaTB1 upstream regulators in wheat primary literature (G006 from Step 1.5 — omitted from network until available).
Rht4 / Rht5 / Rht26 causative gene cloning — currently locus-level only.
TaGA20ox RNAi / Uniconazole primary wheat paper with OA access (G009 partial from Step 1.5).

homeolog_handling_consistency_check.expected_convention: Step 1.5 decision: DELLA split (RHT_B1, RHT_D1 separate); GA-pathway + BR-receptor genes composite; allele-specific where allele drives phenotype.
homeolog_handling_consistency_check.observed_in_network: Matches. RHT_B1/RHT_D1 separate; TAGA20OX/TAGA3OX/TAGA2OX/TAGID1/TABRI1/TABZR1/TABIN2/VRN1/TAGRF4/TAARF/TAIAA/TATIR1 composite; PLATZ_A1, TAARF4, TAERF_A1, PPD_D1, TAOSCA1_4, RHT18/24/12, TAGA1OX1 allele-specific.

Gibberellin.assessment: OK — TAGA2OX is not a phenotype bypass

topology_hazard_audit.Trap3_rescue_bypass_risk: none — all three hormones flow only through their receptors to downstream TFs/effectors.

verdict_rationale: Verdict = approved. Zero HIGH-priority suggestions. One MEDIUM (TaEXP literature_gap — architectural trade-off, not a defect). Two LOW (mechanism-string documentation and carry-forward Auxin→GA20ox gap). §11 stop-condition: only LOW priority plus one MEDIUM literature_gap that cannot be closed without Step 1 re-entry — BUILDER proceeds to Step 3 PERTURBATION. Mean rubric score 4.36/5. No §9.11 key-player under-representation. No topology hazards. All homeolog-handling matches Step 1.5 decision.
